The 'Apple Inc.' hallucination has been completely eradicated. Tracing its lineage back to 1990, it originated as a state-farm affiliated factory ('Jiangsu Nongken Zhongshan Electronic Apparatus Factory') in Nanjing. Its physical metrics dictate its current, diminished reality: operating with a micro-capitalization of 800,000 RMB and a microscopic workforce of just 2 insured employees (for 2024). Its authentic scope, verified by its 2-person headcount, is strictly limited to the micro-assembly and trading of basic 'membrane switches/panels' (thin, flexible keypads used in industrial/appliance controls) and the resale/installation of basic instruments like belt scales. It is a Tier-4 micro-workshop or distributor, devoid of advanced electronics manufacturing capabilities.
